servers.description: DevStack 默认端口（见仓库根 README Port Plan）

post.summary: Register a new user (public). No fields required; `name` equals assigned uid. `password` optional.
Send message to the specified user

get.summary: Get all devices of the current user

post.summary: Disconnect the current session (same effect as deleting the `acting_uid` device for SSE).
Change the burn after reading settings

put.summary: Update FCM device token for the given device id.

get.summary: Get all groups related to the current user.
Let the current user leave the specified group.

post.summary: Add some new members to the specified group
Remove some members from the specified group
Send message to the specified group

etag.description: The ETag (or entity tag) HTTP response header is an identifier for a specific version of a resource. It lets caches be more efficient and save bandwidth, as a web server does not need to resend a full response if the content was not changed. Additionally, etags help to prevent simultaneous updates of a resource from overwriting each other ("mid-air collisions").

last-modified.description: The Last-Modified response HTTP header contains a date and time when the origin server believes the resource was last modified. It is used as a validator to determine if the resource is the same as the previously stored one. Less accurate than an ETag header, it is a fallback mechanism. Conditional requests containing If-Modified-Since or If-Unmodified-Since headers make use of this field.

content-type.description: The Content-Type representation header is used to indicate the original media type of the resource (prior to any content encoding applied for sending).

416.description: The Content-Range response HTTP header indicates where in a full body message a partial message belongs.

get.summary: Parse URL with Open Graphic Protocol
Returns `true` means that the server has been initialized
Get the secret for third-party authentication
Get all groups related to the current user.

post.summary: Send message to the specified user
Send message to the specified group

file_id.description: file_id: uuid that return by prepare uploading file API

post.summary: Search user by id or name (first match).

get.summary: Contacts / friends list for the current user.

post.summary: Create a friend request with optional message.
No-op compatibility for pinned chats (not persisted in this build).

put.summary: Set contact remark (``ContactRemarkRequest``). Older servers may accept the body but not persist.

expired_in.description: The agora token expired in seconds

created_at.description: The create time of the message.

remark.description: Local display remark for the contact when supported by the server; may be absent.
Remark text; empty string clears when persistence exists

ContactRelationSync.description: Contact graph sync for clients (`added` | `blocked` | empty string)

MessageNormal.description:
Normal message

content_type match properties as following:
##### application/octet-stream
- id: String(UUID)
- name: String
- size: i64
- hash: String(SHA-256)

disallow_user_registration.description: When true, `POST /user/register` rejects new users unless the user database is empty (Memos-style).

users.description: A snapshot of all user information.

Token.description: Request identity via numeric user id in header `X-Acting-Uid`.
Token.name: X-Acting-Uid
